enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about credit and debit cards. He criticizes current high interest rates (as high as 23%) as historically extortionary compared to Roman-era caps, blaming deregulation and corporate influence on politics. He predicts government will eventually take over banking within 50-100 years, interest rates will drop to around 2%, and microchip implants will replace physical payment methods.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: extortionary and historically unprecedented; deregulation and corporate political influence are to blame
government will take over banking within 50-100 years, which he sees as a fair outcome
will drop to around 2% once government controls banking
people should be able to opt in and eventually most will adopt them as life becomes easier without wallets
society is trending toward socialism/communism, citing Obamacare as an early step
